name: Notarized Annual Private School Survey
trigger: Annual submission before May 1st

name: Attendance Register (170-Day Rule)
trigger: Min 170 instructional days OR grade-band hours

name: Scholarship Compliance Form (IEPC SCF-1)
trigger: Annual — deadline March 1st

name: Tuition & Fee Schedule
trigger: Annual — scholarship rate must match non-scholarship rate

name: Certificate of Insurance
trigger: Annual renewal — liability limits verified

name: FDLE VECHS Level 2 Clearance (All Staff)
trigger: All staff with student contact — renewed every 5 years

name: Teacher Qualification Records
trigger: Per teacher: degree OR 3yr exp OR special skills

name: Affidavit of Good Moral Character
trigger: Every new hire — notarized before start date

name: Ethics Policy Acknowledgement (Annual)
trigger: Teachers and Admin — signed annually

name: Form DH-684 Immunization Annual Report
trigger: Kindergarten and 7th Grade — submitted by Oct 1

name: Form DH-680 (Blue Card) — Student Immunization
trigger: Entry and Grade 7 — Tdap verified

name: Annual Fire Safety Inspection
trigger: Annual — conducted by State Fire Marshal

name: Monthly Drill Log & After-Action Report
trigger: Monthly emergency drills — logged same day

name: Form DH 1777 — Radon Testing
trigger: Buildings over 1yr old — test every 5 years (max 2 tests)

name: CDL License Scan (Class B + P/S Endorsements)
trigger: Per bus driver — endorsements verified

name: Medical Examiner Certificate (MCSA-5876)
trigger: Per bus driver — renewed annually

name: Form I-20 (Certificate of Eligibility)
trigger: All non-US citizenship students — Active status required

name: Student Reporting Log (Term Registration in SEVIS)
trigger: Each term — SEVIS registration within 30 days of term start

name: Form I-9 (Employment Eligibility Verification)
trigger: All staff — Section 2 signed within 3 business days of start

name: FLSA Exemption Status (Teacher Salary Threshold)
trigger: All teachers — salary >= $684/week verified

name: FMLA Poster & Notice (WH-1420)
trigger: Employer with 50+ employees — posted in break room

name: COPPA Direct Notice to Parents
trigger: Students under 13 using 3rd party apps — parent consent required

name: Vendor Privacy Agreement (DPA)
trigger: All EdTech vendors — prohibits selling student data

name: Beneficial Ownership Information (BOI)
trigger: Corporate entity — FinCEN report required (2024 CTA)

name: Form 8300 (Cash Payments > $10,000)
trigger: Cash transactions > $10,000 — filed within 15 days

name: AHERA Asbestos Management Plan
trigger: Buildings built before 1989 — plan on site and accessible

name: OSHA 300 Log (Injury & Illness)
trigger: Employers with 11+ employees — prior year log posted Feb-Apr

name: Chemical Hygiene Plan (Science Labs)
trigger: Has science labs — SDS binder current + training logged
